title: Pod Mushrooms & the Concentrate
bodyText: From burned spore-pods: [[pc-felson|Felson]]'s **torch-mushroom**, [[pc-eddy|Eddy]]'s **invisibility mushroom** (bonus action, ~3 uses). Judy's **blue-mushroom concentrate** (healing + waterbreathing + disease-resist combined): pauses sickness progression ~1 week/dose — [[koviz]]'s current lifeline. A **Luckstone** (+1 checks & saves) appeared in the S11 prep's travel tables — confirm whether it was actually found.
